props.title: The Cheapest Part of the AI Agent Stack Is a Folder

props.text: Two data points landed this month and nobody connected them: Anthropic opened beta on Claude Managed Agents at $0.08/session-hour for runtime + state + sandboxing, and Letta's LoCoMo benchmark showed an agent with nothing but grep and a folder of files beat purpose-built memory systems 74.0% to 68.5%.
Aeon has been running on the folder answer for nine months — `memory/` as index + daily logs + issue tracker, every write a git commit, every audit a `git log`.
The eight cents an hour isn't buying memory; it's buying someone else's opinions about file layout.
